name: Copy of CrowdStrike Falcon Starting Playbook - 2
creator: b322264a-f82d-4f75-a3ab-9fca86ab90ee
description: CrowdStrike Falcon Starting Playbook provides reference implementation of how CrowdStrike Falcon alerts can be processed in Google SecOps.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Reason":"Malicious","Root Cause":"External attack","Comment":"Write here ...","Assign To User":"","Tags":"","Custom Fields":"","Append Custom Field Values":"false"}

steps.name: Tools_Set Context Value
steps.description: The action sets a key and value in a specific context (alert or case)

steps.name: Alert Priority
steps.description: This block sets the alert priority using a previously defined playbook variable, ensuring consistent prioritization logic for the case workflow.

steps.name: Siemplify_Case Tag
steps.description: Add given tag to the case the current alert is grouped to

steps.name: High Risk Users Check
steps.description: This block checks Google GTI sourced alerts against a SOAR custom list to find matches of targeted Industries.

steps.name: GTI Enrichment - 1
steps.description: This block enhances case entities with Google Threat Intelligence enrichment information. Works for IPs, URLs, hostnames, domains, hashes (MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256), threat actors, and CVEs.

steps.name: Tools_Change Case Name
steps.description: The action changes the case's name (title)

steps.name: Siemplify_Case Tag
steps.description: Add given tag to the case the current alert is grouped to

steps.name: Siemplify_Case Tag
steps.description: Add given tag to the case the current alert is grouped to

steps.name: Google Workspace Enrichment
steps.description: This block enriches user entities with relevant information from Google Workspace, providing additional context to support investigation and response activities.

steps.name: Set Initial Severity
steps.description: This block sets the initial alert score based on the SIEM detection severity or the rule metadata severity label.

steps.name: CrowdStrike Containment
steps.description: This block allows the playbook to perform containment actions on endpoints by targeting the IPs and hostnames associated with the case, helping to prevent further compromise during incident response.

steps.name: Condition
steps.description: This condition determines the progress of the playbook. Conditions are built based on cases data (cases, alerts, vents, entities and environment properties) as-well as data that comes back from previous playbook steps.

metadata.description: This widget displays the highlighted fields for each entity.
